text:
The Flying Lizard Meat (トビヤモリの肉, Tobiyamori no Niku) is an item found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

Although it may look weird, it tastes good and is a favorite ingredient for enthusiasts. 

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Flying Lizard Meat is one of the four ingredients that Gourmet Hunter Menchi requests for her sidequest, obtained after killing a Flying Lizard.
